basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Nagpur Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Medical Officer (AYUSH) Ayurveda Notification 2026 has been released on 01 July 2026 on the official website aiimsnagpur.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Nagpur Medical Officer (AYUSH) Ayurveda Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: A degree in Ayurveda from a recognized University/ Statutory State Board/Council/ Faculty of Indian Medicine or equivalent recognized under the relevant council, Enrolment on the Central Registrar of Ayurveda or State Registrar of Indian Medicine, 03 years clinical and/or teaching experience in a recognized hospital/teaching institution, Desirable: A postgraduate degree(MD/MS Ayurveda) from a recognized University /Statutory State Board/Council/Faculty of Indian Medicine
qualification.details: A degree in Ayurveda from a recognized University/ Statutory State Board/Council/ Faculty of Indian Medicine or equivalent recognized under the relevant council. Enrolment on the Central Registrar of Ayurveda or State Registrar of Indian Medicine. 03 years clinical and/or teaching experience in a recognized hospital/teaching institution. Desirable: A postgraduate degree(MD/MS Ayurveda) from a recognized University /Statutory State Board/Council/Faculty of Indian Medicine.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://aiimsnagpur.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: A degree in Ayurveda from a recognized University/ Statutory State Board/Council/ Faculty of Indian Medicine or equivalent recognized under the relevant council, Enrolment on the Central Registrar of Ayurveda or State Registrar of Indian Medicine, 03 years clinical and/or teaching experience in a recognized hospital/teaching institution, Desirable: A postgraduate degree(MD/MS Ayurveda) from a recognized University /Statutory State Board/Council/Faculty of Indian Medicine

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Nagpur Medical Officer (AYUSH) Ayurveda Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Nagpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Nagpur Medical Officer (AYUSH) Ayurveda Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Nagpur Medical Officer (AYUSH) Ayurveda Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: A degree in Ayurveda from a recognized University/ Statutory State Board/Council/ Faculty of Indian Medicine or equivalent recognized under the relevant council. Enrolment on the Central Registrar of Ayurveda or State Registrar of Indian Medicine. 03 years clinical and/or teaching experience in a recognized hospital/teaching institution. Desirable: A postgraduate degree(MD/MS Ayurveda) from a recognized University /Statutory State Board/Council/Faculty of Indian Medicine.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Nagpur Medical Officer (AYUSH) Ayurveda Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://aiimsnagpur.edu.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Nagpur Medical Officer (AYUSH) Ayurveda Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Nagpur MEDICAL OFFICER (AYUSH) AYURVEDA recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the AIIMS Nagpur MEDICAL OFFICER (AYUSH) AYURVEDA recruitment is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced for the MEDICAL OFFICER (AYUSH) AYURVEDA post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy announced for the MEDICAL OFFICER (AYUSH) AYURVEDA post in AIIMS Nagpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: A degree in Ayurveda from a recognized University/ Statutory State Board/Council/ Faculty of Indian Medicine is required, along with enrollment on the Central Registrar of Ayurveda or State Registrar of Indian Medicine.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the MEDICAL OFFICER (AYUSH) AYURVEDA position?
faq.answer: The age limit is between 21 years and 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the MEDICAL OFFICER (AYUSH) AYURVEDA post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 75,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 1,000/-.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Nagpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification, Interview, and the final Merit List.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of AIIMS Nagpur: https://aiimsnagpur.edu.in.
